commands: Write-Host '=== Looking for all config files ==='
Write-Host '=== Checking for wrapper.conf or zlmapisvc config ==='

if (Test-Path 'E:\ZipLip\ZLMapiConnector\conf\wrapper.conf') { Write-Host '--- wrapper.conf JVM settings ---'; Get-Content 'E:\ZipLip\ZLMapiConnector\conf\wrapper.conf' | Select-String -Pattern 'wrapper.java|Xmx|Xms|XX:|java.command|additional' }
Write-Host '=== Checking Registry for service config ==='
Write-Host '=== Check zlmapisvc.exe config via Procrun ==='
